---
name: New skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill or agent for Mimiron
title: "[Skill] "
labels: skill-proposal
assignees: ""
---

## Skill name

What should this skill be called?

## Description

What does the skill do? (1-2 sentences)

## Workflow

Step-by-step description of what the skill does when invoked.

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Tools required

Which Claude Code tools does the skill need?

- [ ] Read / Grep / Glob
- [ ] Edit / Write
- [ ] Bash (specify prefixes)
- [ ] Other: ...

## Safety considerations

- What could go wrong?
- What should the guard script block?
- What permission mode is appropriate?

## Example usage

```
/skill-name <arguments>
```

## Additional context

Links, references, or prior art.
